title: MineSmooth Lite 128x
description: A balanced version of Minesmooth that keeps the upgraded visuals while being lighter
body:
Minesmooth Lite 128x offers the same visual style, clarity, and polish of the highter resolution version, but with better performance and lighter resource usage. It keeps textures smooth, readable, and visually upgraded while making gameplay stable and comfortable for more players and systems.

quadriweekly update
